emotional_tone: Authoritative, functional, clean, and highly structured.

component_rules.buttons: Solid brand color or clean white with 1px border. Never use generic drop shadows. Ensure contrast ratio is > 4.5:1. Apply data-testid.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn standard but enforce border-slate-200. Focus ring MUST be ring-blue-700.
component_rules.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), minimal shadow (shadow-sm). For hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
component_rules.tables: Dense. Header uses uppercase tracking-wide labels. Rows have border-b border-slate-100. Hover state: bg-slate-50.
component_rules.sidebar: w-64 fixed on desktop. Hidden behind hamburger on mobile. bg-slate-50 with border-r border-slate-200.
component_rules.kanban_cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-md p-3 hover:border-blue-300 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing transition-colors.
component_rules.status_tags: Small, rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium. Colors tied strictly to status (e.g., green for complete, amber for in progress).

icons_and_assets.icon_style: weight='regular' or 'duotone' for active states. Size: 18px-24px depending on context.

images.description: Avatar for active user or project manager
Architectural geometric white background for login screen or empty dashboards

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts via Google Fonts or standard CSS imports.
Implement the Workspace -> Projects -> Tasks hierarchy. Use the sidebar to display workspaces and nested projects.
Ensure 'CONTROL ROOM GRID' is used for dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Maximize density.
Use strict 1px borders (border-slate-200) instead of shadows for separating sections, except for popovers and modals.
For task views, implement List (table-like dense rows), Board (Kanban style, gray columns, white cards), and Calendar (grid layout).
Time tracking widget should be small, persistent or easily accessible from the header, with a clear play/stop state.
Avoid using generic purple or teal for primary actions; strictly adhere to blue-700 and amber-400 accents.
Apply data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements.
